test_results.full_pytest: 464 passed, 1 deselected (known phase-attestation branch limit), 0 failed, 15 subtests passed in 74.76s
test_results.deselected_test: tests/test_pipeline_metrics_timestamps.py::test_runtime_artifacts_not_in_git_tracked - detects force-added .pipeline/ files in phase attestation branch. On main merge, .gitignore excludes these (CLAUDE.md "Phase Evidence Git Hygiene"). Unrelated to cmd_status change.
test_results.functional_smoke: Real COMPLETE state fixture subprocess execution -> returncode=0, "terminal_state=COMPLETE" in stdout confirmed

qa_report.scope_verification: git_diff_acd2705_files: pipeline.py + tests/e2e/test_status_exit_code_5cf4.py (2) scope_manifest_MT-1.json files: pipeline.py + tests/e2e/test_status_exit_code_5cf4.py (2) - exact match trust_root_changes: false (pipeline.py is listed in PM target_files - allowed) Out-of-scope modifications: none (hunks at lines 6309-6477 only, both within cmd_status function body) Line delta: +212/-132 (per-block try/except wrapping). PM line_estimate=80 exceeded but this is not a hard cap acceptance criterion. The increase reflects defensive coding per the P1 policy answer (always exit 0).
qa_report.result: [PASS] all category_check, numeric_verdict, c3_cross_verification, micro_task_boundary, real_cli_path_e2e_check PASS
qa_report.critical_issues: none - Step 0 handover, Step 0-B anti_gaming_read, scope, micro-task boundary, Real CLI Path E2E all PASS.
qa_report.improvement_suggestions: 1. The dev_handover.xml verification block could be more structured (e.g., subprocess_evidence, returncode_assert, stdout_marker_assert) for future auto-parsing. 2. PM step_plan line_estimate=80 may be exceeded by defensive try/except wrapping. Consider raising guidance to 100-150 for safety-first patches. 3. tests/test_pipeline_metrics_timestamps.py::test_runtime_artifacts_not_in_git_tracked yields false positives on phase-attestation branches. Consider auto-detecting base branch (e.g., origin/main) and excepting .pipeline/phase_evidence/** to align with CLAUDE.md "Phase Evidence Git Hygiene". Recommend a separate IMP pipeline.
